MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Kemp in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kemp appeared with the accounting petition in hand and met with the Court Examiner. The accounting petition will be granted, (subject to the written order which is to be prepared by the Court Examiner).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On 1st Account
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Continued To Nov-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Kamp in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kamp stated that he did not know what was being requested by the Court and asked that the funds be transferred to the special needs trust. The Court stated that Mr. Kamp needed legal representation, that an accounting was needed and that a bond needed to be filed. Mr. Kamp stated that he could not afford to hire Counsel. The matter was continued to November 3, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Kamp was directed to call Mr. Kneis (Probate Examiner).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Oct-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On 1st Account
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Oct-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause Re Contempt will be issued to the Co-Trustees, Richard Kamp and Maria Elena Pena for failure to file the First Account and Report. The return date is October 7, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On 1st Account
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Continued To Aug-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: 9:43 a.m. No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Co-Trustees, Richard Kamp and Maria Elena Pena to appear and explain why they have failed to file the required First Account and Report for the special needs trust, and to confirm that the required bond has been obtained and filed. The return date is August 26, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition Ao Approve Compromise Of An Adult Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Off Calendar

Compromise Of An Adult Person With Disability
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Compromise of a Pending Action for an Adult Person with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
David A. Sherman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Maria Elena Kamp as Guardian ad litem for Rebecca L. Kamp.
Ms. Kamp was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $13,000.00.
Medical Expenses NOT paid directly by defendant $1,110.48.
A net balance of $37,889.52 to be paid to the Rebecca L. Kamp Special Needs Trust which is hereby established by this Order.

Order Approving Compromise
of a Pending Action was submitted to and signed by the Court.
